# S3 conformance

`go-faster/fs` is gated in CI against **220** tests from the upstream
[ceph/s3-tests](https://github.com/ceph/s3-tests) suite — the objective,
client-driven measure of S3 compatibility. Every pull request runs this exact
set and fails if any test regresses. The list only grows as features land.

## Conformance by feature area

| Feature area | Passing conformance tests |
|--------------|--------------------------:|
| Multipart upload | 26 |
| Object tagging | 8 |
| Object metadata | 20 |
| Server-side copy | 26 |
| Conditional requests | 9 |
| Ranged reads | 4 |
| Encryption passthrough | 12 |
| HTTP protocol | 2 |
| Bucket listing | 66 |
| Bucket lifecycle | 23 |
| Object CRUD | 24 |
| **Total** | **220** |

## SDK & client coverage

Beyond ceph/s3-tests, the server is exercised end-to-end through real S3
clients:

| Client | How |
|--------|-----|
| [minio-go](https://github.com/minio/minio-go) | in-process integration tests (`integration/`) |
| [aws-sdk-go-v2](https://github.com/aws/aws-sdk-go-v2) | in-process integration tests (`integration/`) |
| aws-cli, MinIO `mc`, `s3cmd`, `rclone` | live-binary smoke matrix (`scripts/cli-smoke.sh`, CI-gated) |

Custom `fs.Storage` backends inherit the behavioral contract via the
[`storagetest`](../storagetest) conformance suite.
